title: chromatotriccum pseudopeloricum
intro: Chromatotriccum pseudopeloricum, also known as False Peloric Chickweed, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Chromatotriccum pseudopeloricum include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
